title: Functions should not depend on global or free variables
description: Global and free variables can lead to unintended side effects and make code more difficult to understand and maintain.
message: Function depends on global or free variable

remediation.func: Rename global/free variable, or pass it as an argument

recommendation: Avoid using global and free variables in functions.

noncompliant.description: Using a global variable within a function

compliant.description: Passing a variable as an argument instead of using a global variable

why_is_this_an_issue: Global and free variables can introduce unintended side effects and make code harder to understand.
how_to_fix: Avoid using global and free variables in functions. Instead, pass them as arguments or define local variables within the function.

metadata.title: Functions should not depend on global or free variables
